description: Monitors all connected integrations every 30 minutes and sends Slack alerts to the admin channel when something breaks — before it silently stops your routines.

installs.description: Org settings: silence window, check interval, optional alert channel override
Health state file — written after every check run. Initialized empty.
Core health check skill. Checks all monitored integrations, writes state, sends Slack alerts with configurable silence window.
Patch spec for integration-onboarding skill. Apply Step 8b manually to the existing skill or run the setup skill to wire it automatically.
Setup skill — configures admin channel, silence window, GitHub repo. Runs automatically after install and can be re-invoked any time.

customize.description: Hours to wait before sending a repeat alert for the same unresolved issue
How often the health check routine runs, in minutes
IANA timezone for the health check routine schedule (e.g. America/New_York, Europe/London, UTC). Collected during setup — setup skill asks the admin directly.
GitHub repo to use for L4/L5 health checks, in owner/repo format. Set to null to skip repo-level checks.

post-install.name: Configure integration health alerts
post-install.description: Walks through admin channel setup, silence window, and GitHub repo. Starts the health check routine.

changelog.notes: Initial release. Dynamic integration registry, configurable silence window, self-healing routine, three alert types (first alert, reminder, restored), admin channel setup flow.
